headline: Akamai Adds MediaMelon To Cloud As Streaming Analytics And Valuation Draw Focus
summary: Akamai Technologies (NasdaqGS:AKAM) has expanded its Qualified Compute Partner Program to include MediaMelon. The move integrates MediaMelon's SmartSight streaming analytics platform directly on Akamai Cloud. The combined solution focuses on real time, AI driven analytics for global media operators across multiple regions.
